title: Who is God? (The Trinity)
talkingPoints: God is a Father: He is completely safe. He is never moody or waiting to get angry. He is always bursting with love for us.
Jesus shows us God: If we want to know what God looks like, we look at Jesus. Jesus is kind, strong, and heals people.
The Holy Spirit is our Helper: God's love isn't far away; He puts His Spirit right inside our hearts to give us 'God-hugs' from the inside.

title: The Good World & The Sickness
talkingPoints: God makes beautiful things: The trees, animals, and people were all made because God wanted to share His love.
The Big Owie: People decided they didn't want to stay close to God's light. When they walked away, the world got a 'big owie' (sin). People started getting sad and sick.
God didn't run away: When we get an owie, God doesn't get mad at us for bleeding. He immediately promises to come fix it.

title: The Great Rescue
talkingPoints: The Brave Doctor: Jesus came into our broken world to be our Doctor. He took our 'big owie' on Himself on the cross to make the medicine we need.
Beating the Dark: Jesus went into the darkest cave where death hides. Because He is the strongest King, He broke the doors, woke up, and chased the scary things away!
The Empty Tomb: Easter is the best surprise party ever because Jesus won, and now He shares His life with us.

title: The Reign of Grace
talkingPoints: Grace means 'Free Gift': We can never earn God's love, and we can never lose it. It is entirely free.
Running to the Light: When we make a mistake, we don't hide. We run straight to Jesus. Saying 'I'm sorry' is just letting the Doctor put a band-aid on our heart.
Living by the Spirit: We don't have to carry a heavy backpack of rules. The Holy Spirit gives us the power to be kind and brave.

title: Spiritual Reality
talkingPoints: Two Teams: There is a real invisible world. God's team is light and life. The enemy's team is dark and tricky, trying to make people forget God's love.
Total Victory: The bad guys already lost on Easter. They have no real power over us. Their only weapon is telling lies.
Armor of Light: Because Jesus is in us, we are filled with light. We never have to be scared of the dark, bad dreams, or anything unseen.
